<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

:::: {.content-visible unless-format="revealjs"}
To review the existing templates available to your organization:

1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

1.  Under {{< fa file >}} Documents, select **Templates**.

1. Select one of the tabs for the document type with the templates you want to view:

   - **Development**^[[Working with documentation](/guide/documentation/working-with-documentation.qmd)]
   - **Validation**^[[Preparing validation reports](/guide/validation/preparing-validation-reports.qmd)]
   - **Monitoring**^[[Ongoing monitoring](/guide/monitoring/ongoing-monitoring.qmd)]
   - **Custom**^[[Managing documents](/guide/templates/managing-documents.qmd)]

   Displayed in list view is an overview of information for templates under that specific document type.

1. Select one of the available templates to view detailed information about the template:[^template-info]

:::: {.flex .flex-wrap .justify-around}

::: {.w-40-ns}

**Right column:**

- Template name
- Template version (drop-down selection)
- Template version owner
- Version creation date
- Version notes
- Template outline
- Records using selected template version
- Records using that template version as a base template
:::

::: {.w-40-ns}

**Left column:**

- Template type
- Template description
- Template owner
- Template creation date
- Records using that template and which versions

:::

::::


<!-- FOOTNOTES -->

[^template-info]:

   - **Versions & outlines:** [Customize document templates](/guide/templates/customize-document-templates.qmd#edit-template-outlines)
   - **Types:** [Managing documents](/guide/templates/managing-documents.qmd)


::::

:::: {.content-hidden unless-format="revealjs"}
1. In the left sidebar, click **{{< fa gear >}} Settings**.

1.  Under {{< fa file >}} Documents, select **Templates**.

1. Select one of the tabs for [the document type with the templates you want to view](/guide/templates/managing-documents.qmd){target="_blank"}.

1. Select one of the available templates to view detailed information about the template.

::::
